name: gdc-sdk-node-ts
description: Next-generation Node runtime package for the GDC SDK family
author: Antifraud Services Inc.

scripts.test:e2e:live-gw: npm run build && RUN_LIVE_GW_E2E=1 node --test tests/live-gw-node-runtime.e2e.test.mjs
scripts.test:e2e:live-gw:professional: npm run build && RUN_LIVE_GW_E2E=1 LIVE_GW_E2E_SUITE=professional node --test tests/live-gw-node-runtime.e2e.test.mjs
scripts.test:e2e:live-gw:individual: npm run build && RUN_LIVE_GW_E2E=1 LIVE_GW_E2E_SUITE=individual node --test tests/live-gw-node-runtime.e2e.test.mjs
scripts.test:e2e:live-gw:clinical: npm run build && RUN_LIVE_GW_E2E=1 LIVE_GW_E2E_SUITE=clinical node --test tests/live-gw-node-runtime.e2e.test.mjs
scripts.test:e2e:live-gw:didcomm-plain: npm run build && RUN_LIVE_GW_E2E=1 LIVE_GW_E2E_TRANSPORT=didcomm-plain node --test tests/live-gw-node-runtime.e2e.test.mjs
scripts.test:e2e:live-gw:legacy-fhir: npm run build && RUN_LIVE_GW_E2E=1 LIVE_GW_E2E_TRANSPORT=legacy-fhir node --test tests/live-gw-node-runtime.e2e.test.mjs
scripts.test:e2e:live-gw:all: npm run build && RUN_LIVE_GW_E2E=1 LIVE_GW_E2E_TRANSPORT=all node --test tests/live-gw-node-runtime.e2e.test.mjs
